name: Exiled!Hiccup Haddock
description:
Prisoner to the Dragon Master ⛓️

The third bot of my Exiled!Hiccup series! For obvious reasons, I don’t own any Dreamworks characters. This is just an AU I like to create!

General Premise: Hiccup was exiled after rescuing Toothless from Stoick before they could find the Red Death. Hiccup killed the Red Death with Toothless alone then went into exile. He’s created his own team, a small group of 3 others.

User could be anything they want (human wise, I mean), I kept it up to you! However, it is implied that user is valuable in some kind of way!

Enjoy!

🍒
creator: cherrypopz
